blockers.description: Vercel/PostHog wizard skill auto-wrote scaffolding files during the planner subagent run (instrumentation-client.ts, next.config.ts, src/lib/, posthog-setup-report.md). These are NOT from intentional execution — they are side effects of the vercel-plugin skill triggering on planning-doc text. They partially implement what Plan 06 is supposed to build and may conflict with the Phase 1 executor.
blockers.workaround: Before running /gsd:execute-phase 1, decide whether to (a) delete the spurious files and let the executor build them per plan, or (b) treat them as partial implementation and reconcile with Plans 01/06 manually. Recommended: delete them. See .continue-here.md Critical Anti-Patterns table for detail.

human_actions_pending.action: Delete or reconcile auto-generated scaffolding files (see blockers)
human_actions_pending.context: Prevents conflicts when Phase 1 executor runs

decisions.rationale: Next 14 reached EOL 2025-10-26 per GSD stack research; amendment recorded in docs/cluu-v1-design.md §8 + PROJECT.md Key Decisions

decisions.decision: 5 coarse phases (1 Scaffold, 2 Walking Skeleton, 3 Meadow + Persistence + Library MD, 4 Remaining Biomes + Share Cards, 5 Launch Hardening)
decisions.rationale: Matches config.granularity=coarse and ARCHITECTURE.md proposed ordering; condenses design doc §12's 24-week plan into component groupings

decisions.decision: Use Next.js 16 proxy.ts convention (not middleware.ts); require explicit cookie-sync to mutable NextResponse
decisions.rationale: Next 16 renamed the convention; Supabase SSR docs updated to match as of April 2026; missing cookie-sync causes sign-out-loop bug. Encoded as D-25/D-26/D-27 in CONTEXT.md
Vitest 4.1.4 is current stable April 2026; ^2 pin was two majors behind; Node 24 + Vite 6 satisfy v4 requirements. D-23 revised.

decisions.decision: Supabase anonymous sign-ins from visit 1; upgrade via updateUser({email}) on magic-link signup — no row migration
decisions.rationale: STACK.md §2 prescribes this pattern; collapses Pitfall 4 from data-copy to field-update. D-04.

decisions.decision: Cluu 4-layer sprite Container (base + body + head + back + eyes) from Phase 1
decisions.rationale: Phase 3 cosmetics plumbing needs it; retrofit from single-sprite would require rewriting every Cluu render path. D-13.

decisions.decision: Plan 08 is the ONLY autonomous:false plan in Phase 1
decisions.rationale: Cross-browser magic-link flow is manual per OPS-04; mixing auto+manual in one plan causes commit-ownership confusion

decisions.decision: Plans 03-08 cosmetic s/middleware/proxy/ drift fixed in-place rather than full regen
decisions.rationale: Changes were prose-only (no files_modified or action changes); regen would burn unnecessary Opus budget

uncommitted_files.why: workflow._auto_chain_active flag toggled during auto-chain experiments; safe to commit or reset

context_notes: Project initialized end-to-end: design doc → PROJECT/REQUIREMENTS/ROADMAP → research → CONTEXT → plans (regenerated twice, once after interactive CONTEXT revision) → plan-checker pass. All 12 Phase 1 REQ-IDs covered by plans. All 3 BLOCKER pitfalls absorbed. No code has been executed yet. The wizard-generated files in the working tree are a skill-injection side-effect, not evidence of execution.
